summary: Locked the .plan workspace contract and removed the deferred-backlog split.
Committed the installable Ralph Loop framework core as a3716bf.
Verified install, update, adoption, and --all flows against clean local repos under /tmp.

Public raw/codeload GitHub endpoints still return 404, so the real public curl|bash bootstrap could not run. Patched README bootstrap URLs from main to master to match the current remote HEAD while the repo remains non-public.

Installed the Ralph Loop core bundle into the live neighborhood-showcase repo, migrated legacy workflow state into .plan, and verified a real Ralph Loop iteration can read the migrated workspace end-to-end.
Hardened sync-state, retrieve-history, and archive-run into deterministic helper scripts with in-place status syncing, ranked history bundles, and fuller run-family archival.

Added runtime-state.sh plus wrapper enforcement so Ralph Loop runners consume sub-task model metadata, persist retry/retrieval/escalation state, and auto-sync blocked/done transitions through the .plan helper surface.

Revalidated the public bootstrap path: origin still reports master as the remote HEAD, but public raw/codeload GitHub endpoints for both master and main still return HTTP 404, so T-09 remains blocked by remote-repo-not-public.

Iteration 3 reread the canonical .plan surfaces and found no dependency-safe executable sub-task. T-09 / ST-01 remains blocked by remote-repo-not-public, so the backlog currently has no runnable work.

Replaced legacy bundle/skill/target selection with explicit agent + availability selection, made the v1 framework-owned skill set mandatory, and verified non-interactive install plus interactive prompt order for the new public selection surface.

Added Node test coverage for the 3x2 agent/availability matrix, agents-first prompt ordering, and user-facing validation failures, then verified the suite and a throwaway install that wrote the new selection metadata.

Defined shared versus agent-specific asset classes in framework-files.json and skills-manifest.json, updated the installer to copy only selected agent runner scripts and remove unselected ones, and touched the runner scripts with management comments.

note: Unblocked history-retrieval-exhausted (prior-session blocker); reconciled stale docs and planning evidence. Checked T-09 acceptance criteria, updated run-summary decisions to reflect hardened installer contract, verified README/framework docs accuracy, validated bug audit resolution notes for BUG-006 and BUG-008. All T-20 acceptance criteria satisfied.

summary: Modified installSkills to accept injectable prompts parameter and preserve skipped skill records in writeFrameworkMetadata by merging existing skills not in the current install batch. Exported installSkills and writeFrameworkMetadata for testing.

Created installer/tests/index.test.mjs with 6 tests: conflict prompt consolidation, skip/overwrite outcomes, writeFrameworkMetadata metadata preservation, skipped-timestamp integration test, claude provider asset routing, and all-agent install. All 33 tests pass. E-09 is now fully complete.

Verified all T-25 acceptance criteria pass — consumerOwnedStarterFiles array exists at top-level and inside sharedAssets, RULES.md removed from managedFiles, prompt.local.md and CONTEXT.md absent from managed/workflow arrays. Prior commit had already implemented changes; this iteration closes the status gap.
